evidence.content: Funding rounds: [{"company":"Codeship","round_type":"seed","raised_usd":300000,"announced_on":"2013-02-25","investors":["Rothenberg Ventures","Seedcamp","Techstars","Jeff Seibert","Mike Rothenberg","Philipp Moehring","Semyon Dukach","Ty Danco"]},{"company":"Codeship","round_type":"venture","raised_usd":2600000,"announced_on":"2014-02-12","investors":["Boston Seed Capital","F-Prime Capital Partners","Sigma Prime Ventures"]},{"company":"Codeship","round_type":"venture","raised_usd":1500000,"announced_on":"2015-12-03","investors":["Boston Seed Capital","F-Prime Capital Partners","Sigma Prime Ventures"]}]

[SYNTHESIZED FROM CRUNCHBASE DUMP — NOT A COMPANY-SUPPLIED DECK] Codeship is a B2B|Cloud Computing|Developer Tools|IaaS|SaaS|Software|Testing|Web Development company based in Boston, USA. Crunchbase records total funding of 4400000 USD across 3 retrieved rounds; the latest retrieved round was 2015-12-03.
No direct contradictions were established from available evidence.

Codeship team: strengths=Associated with an operating B2B cloud computing and developer tools company founded in 2011.; The company raised $4.4 million across three recorded funding rounds through December 2015.; concerns=No individual team members, roles, education, or demonstrated achievements are provided.; Funding and investor participation are only indirect signals and do not establish team excellence.; No evidence is provided about product performance, customer traction, or operational outcomes.; school tier=unknown; prior outputs=none found.

Competitors: CircleCI (Cloud-based continuous integration and delivery platform competing directly with Codeship.); Travis CI (Hosted CI/CD service for software development teams and open-source projects.); Jenkins (Widely adopted automation server providing continuous integration and delivery capabilities.); GitLab CI/CD (Integrated source control and CI/CD platform competing for developer workflow automation.); Buildkite (Developer-focused CI/CD platform offering hosted orchestration with self-hosted build agents.)
Buildkite: investor signal=unknown; trajectory=No funding rounds or investors provided, so funding trajectory cannot be assessed.; threat=low.
Jenkins: investor signal=unknown; trajectory=One $500,000 seed round announced on 2015-04-01, with no investors listed and no subsequent rounds provided.; threat=low.
Travis CI: investor signal=unknown; trajectory=No funding rounds or investor data provided; trajectory cannot be assessed.; threat=low.

CircleCI: investor signal=medium; trajectory=Raised an undisclosed round in April 2012, followed by a $1.5M seed round in February 2013 and a $6M venture round in February 2014, showing accelerating disclosed funding. The rounds included SV Angel, a listed high-signal investor.; threat=medium.
GitLab CI/CD: investor signal=unknown; trajectory=No funding rounds or investors were provided, so funding trajectory cannot be assessed.; threat=low.

founderScoreHistory.reason: Reduce the persistent score because team-level evidence is absent, no disclosed Codeship investor is on the high-signal allowlist, CircleCI has a stronger revealed investor signal, and Codeship's last recorded round was in 2015 with no follow-on shown. The confirmed multi-round funding history prevents a more severe reduction.
